# Zohocharts

Zoho Charts, our common charting library is built over d3.js with a clear objective – obviating the need to create a separate charting library for every product.


# Release notes!

  - http://zohocharts/features.php
  

### Installation

zohocharts requires [Node.js](https://nodejs.org/) to run.

Install the dependencies and devDependencies and start the server.

```sh
$ npm install -d
```

For production environments...

```sh
$ npm install @zohocharts/zc
```

### Modules available!



| type | module name | 
| ------ | ------ | 
| chart types | "area", "bar", "boxplot", "bubblepie", "bullet", "dial", "funnel", "gantt", "heatmap", "maps","line", "packedbubble", "pie", "pyramid", "scatter", "bubble", "sunburst", "treemap", "waterfall", "wordcloud", "sankey" | 
| components | "annotation", "brush", "scale", "axis", "canvaseffects", "canvaslabel", "effects", "events", "formatter", "geozoom", "label", "legend", "pivot", "scroll", "threshold", "tooltip", "zoom"|
| parsers | "customMarkParser", "markSelection" |

### Submodules available!

| module | submodule name | 
| ------ | ------ | 
| area | "canvasarea" | 
| bar | "canvasbar","svgbar", "levelmarker", "whisker", "morph", "radial" |
| heatmap | "svgheatmap","canvasheatmap" | 
| line | "canvasline", "svgline" | 
| maps | _"geobubble", "geobubblepie", "geoheatmap", "geoscatter" | 
| scatter | "svgscatter", "canvasscatter" |
| bubble | "canvasbubble", "svgbubble" |
| treemap | "canvastreemap", "svgtreemap" |
| wordcloud | "canvaswordcloud", "svgwordcloud" |
| annotation | "customNotes", "stickyNotes" |
| sankey | "hierarchy" |
| axis | "linearaxis", "polarAxis", "tickFilter" | 
| canvaseffects | "canvasgradients", "canvaspatterns" |
| canvaslabel | "bar", "boundbox", "hierarchy", "scatter" |
| effects | "gradients", "patterns", "filters", "clips" |
| events | "bulletevents", "nonplotevents" |
| label | "bar", "boundbox", "bullet", "dial", "funnel", "hierarchy", "pie", "scatter" |
| legend | "discrete", "continuous", "sizeNested", "sizeList", "sizeSlider", "shapeList" |
| scroll | "brushscroll", "smoothscroll" |
| threshold | "coloroverlay", "line", "rangeband" | 
| Funnel | pivot |
| scale | "colorscale", "sizescale", "shapescale" |
| zoom  | "chartzoom", "mapzoom", "sankeyzoom" |
| processor  | "cartesian", "hierarchy" |
| renderer  | "svg", "canvas" |
| markers  | "geo-location-1", "geo-location-2", "geo-location-3", "geo-pin-1", "geo-pin-2", "geo-pin-3", "geo-flag-1", "geo-flag-2", "geo-flag-3" |
| tooltip | "block" |
| customMarkParser | "conversionline", "marker", "bar", "axis" |
### Custom visuals
| layout | "pie", "stack", "tree" |
| transform | "groupby" |


### Custom bundle

Use custom bundle to include only the chart types and features you need. To build the custom bundle, you need to add the following files and run npm.



## package.json

```
{
  "name": "zc-custom-example",
  "version": "2.35",
  "scripts": {
    "prepare": "rollup -c && uglifyjs zc.js -c -m -o zc.min.js"
  },
  "dependencies": {
     "@zohocharts/zc": "1.1.5"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "rollup": "4.18.0",
    "rollup-plugin-node-resolve": "2",
    "uglify-js": "2"
}
}
```

## rollup.config.js

```
export default [{
    input: "index.js",
    output:{
        format: "umd",
        file: "dist/zc.js",
        name: "$ZC",
        strict : false,
        sourcemap: true,
        globals: {
            "@zohocharts/d3" : "d3"
        },
        external: [
            "@zohocharts/d3"
        ]
    }
}];

```

To build:

```
npm install
npm run prepublishOnly
npm run build
```

You may also run Rollup and UglifyJS directly:

```
rollup -c && uglifyjs zc.js -c -m -o zc.min.js
```
